title: Delete a specific file from a column
excerpt:
Hey, 
I saw that currently you can only clear a full file column but not delete a specific file. It found be great if we can delete a specific file (with assetId or other id that suits you)

posts.author: ram_perel (Ram Perel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,
I saw that currently you can only clear a full file column but not delete a specific file. It found be great if we can delete a specific file (with assetId or other id that suits you)

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you @ram_perel for the request

posts.author: rbabayoff (Ronen Babayoff @ Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there,

Also mentioning that this has already been requested years ago here, and also here.

Specifically, form builder apps need this for the update existing item feature , to allow users to do the same thing they can do within monday.

Please upvote this: @dipro , @YuvrajSingh , @tgurler, @guy.gavish , @noam.lapidot.

Cheers
